category_sources: source_facts.description says SpiceDB is an open-source Google Zanzibar-inspired database; official AuthZed docs describe SpiceDB documentation and access-control concepts.

repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/authzed/spicedb, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
